goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 10:15' and should depart from 'stansted airport'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '7 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'travellers rest'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for 'the same group of people' at '17:45' on 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 10:15 and should depart from stansted airport
The train should leave on wednesday and should go to cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 7 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called travellers rest
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 17:45 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
